headline: Trump 🍊👊 50% TARIFF SLAP on CANADA 🍁💥 Carney VOWS 🔥 INTENSIFY 🗣️ TRADE TALKZ 🤝
text: Donald Trump 🍊🦅 just DROPPED a 50% TARIFF 💸🛡️ BOMB on Canada 🍁🤡 for "UNEQUAL TREATMENT" of US CARS 🚗🥃 DAIRY 🥛 and BOOZE 🍺🍷! Wine 🍷, hockey sticks 🏒, and cement 🏗️ got HIT while energy ⚡, potash 🧂, critical minerals 💎 and fish 🐟 SKATED FREE 🏒❄️! Mark Carney 🍁👨‍💼 said Canada ready to "INTENSIFY" 🤜💥 talks like a maple syrup chug challenge 🥞🍁! White House 🏛️ says tariffs in 30 days ⏰ and it's a MAJOR ESCALATION 📈😤 between North American NEIGHBOURS 🏠🇨🇦🇺🇸! Tariffs apply EVEN if under USMCA 🤝🚫 cuz Trump says Canada VIOLATING THE DEAL 📜😡! Carney called it "THREATS TO SOVEREIGNTY" 🇨🇦🛡️ after Trump's 51st STATE joke 😂🗳️! Already got 15-50% on steel 🏗️, aluminum 🥫, copper 🪙, 35% on softwood lumber 🌲 and 25% on non-US car parts 🚙! Canada FIRED BACK with 25% on US steel 🥊, aluminum 🥫, vehicles 🚗! Trump also MAD about wildfire smoke 🌲🔥☁️ but NOT in the orders, instead it's cars, dairy and alcohol beefs 🍺🥛! Howard Lutnick 🧔💼 said Canada should "COME SECOND" to US 🇺🇸🥈! Dairy drama 🥛 from Canada's supply management LIMITS 🚧 and 300% tariffs on imports 🤑! Canadian provinces BOYCOTT US booze 🍺🚫 since last year and won't lift until tariffs GONE 🗑️! Trade negotiators trying to DEAL 🤝 before 30-day countdown ⏳! USMCA not renewed, now rolling annual reviews 📅! Supreme Court STRUCK DOWN earlier tariffs ⚖️🚫 but Trump using Section 338 🧾 instead! Candance Laing 🗣️ called it "REGRETTABLE DECISION" 😩 and wants "MEANINGFUL PROGRESS" before duties HIT 💥! Chris Swonger 🍸 warned of "RISK OF FURTHER RETALIATION" 🔄💥! It's a TRADE WAR TANGO 💃🕺 between the maple leaf 🍁 and the eagle 🦅!
